candidates.why: Only clear direct cost line in the income statement; appears to represent cost of goods sold/cost of sales.

candidates.why: Likely overhead bucket and appears distinct from direct product cost line 'Goods for Resale'.
Overhead component; small but valid SG&A-type line.
